utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Puzzler . A bit of a puzzle . Why do not you um , check the copy room , maybe you left the contracts in there ?

utterances.speaker: Tag
utterances.text: How could I have left them in the copy room ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I do not know Tag ! How can your genitals make phone calls ? Okay ? It is not a perfect world ! Just go please .
